description: Nestled right on Blakeburn Lagoon, this refreshed 3-bed, 2-bath townhome is the ultimate family retreat! Updates include fresh paint, modern lighting, luxury vinyl floors, & cozy new carpets. Perfectly located for active families, steps from Blakeburn Elementary, Cedar Drive, & Terry Fox Secondary. Enjoy morning coffee on your walkout patio or balcony overlooking the water. The layout features two bright bedrooms, including a large Master with ensuite & laundry. The private top-floor bedroom with its own deck is ideal for an office, teen retreat, or a playroom! Huge tandem garage easily fits two SUVs plus storage, bikes, toys or your home gym. Minutes to New PoCo Rec Centre, Costco, Shopping, Dining, & West Coast Express. Roofs, Patios, & Windows all done. Open House Sunday Feb 15 @ 2-4pm.
